name: simple-statistics

en.when_to_use: Use it instead of hand-written formulas when you need a reproducible statistical kernel for quantiles, sample variance, correlation, or univariate regression, because native AI fails on sample/population denominators, quantile interpolation, ties, and empty-set boundaries.
en.why_valuable: AI defaults can only provide plausible-looking statistical formulas and cannot reliably preserve sample/population semantics, quantile rules, and invalid-input handling; simple-statistics fixes these numeric conventions with zero-dependency named functions.

data_in.note: Descriptive statistics accepts number[]; univariate regression strictly accepts [x,y][]. Do not pass object rows directly to functions; project the columns first and filter out non-finite values.

schema.values: number[] -- descriptive-statistics sample; all values must be finite before calling
schema.quantileP?: number | number[] -- quantile probability from 0..1; default 0.5
schema.points?: [number, number][] -- simple linear-regression points; default [] (do not calculate regression)

when_to_use: 需要百分位、样本方差、相关性或一元回归的可复算统计核时用它而非手写公式,因为原生 AI 在样本/总体分母、分位插值、ties 与空集边界上失败。
why_valuable: AI 默认只能给出看似正确的统计公式,无法稳定保持 sample/population 语义、分位规则和异常输入处理;simple-statistics 用零依赖命名函数固定这些数值口径。

data_in.note: 描述统计吃 number[];一元回归严格吃 [x,y][]。不要把对象行直接喂给函数,先按列投影并过滤非有限数。

schema.values: number[] —— 描述统计样本;调用前须全部为有限数
schema.quantileP?: number | number[] —— 0..1 分位概率,默认 0.5
schema.points?: [number, number][] —— 一元线性回归点,默认 [](不计算回归)

provides._note: headless-primitive:不直接渲染、无 L 级、无 carriers 矩阵;纯 JS 数值层。
provides.outputs: 均值、中位数、分位数、样本/总体方差、标准差、相关系数,以及 {m,b} 回归参数和预测函数。

api_surface.variance: sampleVariance(values) 与 variance(values) 语义分开

peer.note: 本条只产标量或采样序列;回归线可把 x 代入预测函数后生成 [x,y][],再交给图表组件。

boot.note: 多数函数对空数组会抛错或没有统计意义;消费 AI 须先拒绝空 values,并显式选择 sampleVariance 或 variance,不可互换。

isolation.evidence: Verified vs jsDelivr simple-statistics@7.9.3: all named exports used by boot present in +esm (w as mean, W as median, A as quantile, I as sampleVariance, Or as linearRegression, Ur as linearRegressionLine; also fr as sampleCorrelation). Signatures from src/*.d.ts: linearRegression(data: number[][]) => {m,b}; linearRegressionLine(mb:{b,m}) => (x)=>number; sampleCorrelation(x:number[], y:number[]) => number; quantile(x:number[], p:number|number[]) => number|number[] — all match api_surface and schema (values/quantileP/points consumed exactly by boot). headless-primitive: pure-JS numeric layer, zero DOM/event/style footprint, so trivially shadow-safe (no carriers matrix needed by design).
